ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactures the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., t-shirt, jeans, dress) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product (e.g., cotton, polyester, wool) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is designed (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "eur_size" TEXT /* European size equivalent */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "height" TEXT /* Recommended height range for the size */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal cost of the item after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size for quicker recommendations */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer that the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "neck" INTEGER /* Neck measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer that the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being recommended */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
